name: Subcellular Fractionation (Cytoplasmic / Nuclear / Membrane)
nameCn: 亚细胞分级分离（细胞质 / 细胞核 / 膜组分）

briefSteps.en: Wash and pellet cells → lyse with 0.1% NP-40 buffer on ice → pellet nuclei at 600×g → save cytoplasmic supernatant → wash nuclei 2× → extract nuclear proteins with high-salt buffer → optional 100,000×g ultracentrifuge for membrane fraction → quantify all fractions → verify by western blot with compartment markers
briefSteps.zh: 清洗并收集细胞 → 冰上 0.1% NP-40 裂解液裂解 → 600×g 沉淀细胞核 → 保留细胞质上清 → 洗涤细胞核 2 次 → 高盐缓冲液提取核蛋白 → 可选 100,000×g 超速离心获取膜组分 → 定量所有组分 → WB 用区室标志蛋白验证

detailedSteps.en: Wash cells twice with ice-cold PBS. Collect by scraping (adherent cells) or centrifuge at 500×g for 5 min at 4°C (suspension cells). Start with ≥2×10⁷ cells. Work on ice throughout.
detailedSteps.zh: 用冰冷 PBS 洗涤细胞两次。贴壁细胞用细胞刮刀收集，悬浮细胞 500×g、4°C 离心 5 min 收集。起始量 ≥2×10⁷ 细胞。全程冰上操作。

detailedSteps.en: Resuspend cell pellet in nuclei isolation buffer (10 mM HEPES pH 7.9, 10 mM KCl, 0.1 mM EDTA, 0.1% NP-40 + protease inhibitors) at 200 µL per 10⁷ cells. Pipette gently 10 times. Incubate on ice for 10–15 min. Do NOT vortex.
detailedSteps.zh: 每 10⁷ 细胞加 200 µL 核分离缓冲液（10 mM HEPES pH 7.9、10 mM KCl、0.1 mM EDTA、0.1% NP-40 + 蛋白酶抑制剂）重悬。轻柔吹打 10 次。冰上孵育 10–15 min。不要涡旋。

detailedSteps.en: Pellet nuclei by centrifugation at 600×g for 5 min at 4°C. Transfer supernatant to a fresh tube — this is the cytoplasmic fraction. Verify nuclear integrity by microscopy (nuclei appear dark and intact in pellet).
detailedSteps.zh: 600×g、4°C 离心 5 min 沉淀细胞核。将上清转至新管——即细胞质组分。显微镜验证核完整性（沉淀中的细胞核应呈暗色且完整）。

detailedSteps.en: Wash nuclear pellet: gently resuspend in 500 µL ice-cold PBS, pipette carefully, and centrifuge at 600×g for 5 min at 4°C. Repeat wash twice to remove cytoplasmic contamination.
detailedSteps.zh: 洗涤核沉淀：轻柔重悬于 500 µL 冰冷 PBS，小心吹打，600×g、4°C 离心 5 min。重复洗涤两次去除细胞质污染。

detailedSteps.en: Extract nuclear proteins: resuspend washed nuclear pellet in high-salt nuclear extraction buffer (20 mM HEPES pH 7.9, 400 mM NaCl, 1 mM EDTA, 1 mM DTT, 10% glycerol + protease inhibitors). Rotate at 4°C for 30 min, then briefly sonicate (3 × 5 s pulses, 20% amplitude).
detailedSteps.zh: 提取核蛋白：用高盐核提取缓冲液（20 mM HEPES pH 7.9、400 mM NaCl、1 mM EDTA、1 mM DTT、10% 甘油 + 蛋白酶抑制剂）重悬洗涤后的核沉淀。4°C 旋转 30 min，再短暂超声（3 × 5 s，20% 振幅）。

detailedSteps.en: Clarify nuclear extract by centrifugation at 16,000×g for 15 min at 4°C. Collect supernatant (nuclear extract). The pellet is insoluble chromatin and can be discarded or extracted separately with SDS buffer.
detailedSteps.zh: 16,000×g、4°C 离心 15 min 澄清核提取物。收集上清（核提取物）。沉淀为不溶性染色质，可丢弃或用 SDS 缓冲液单独提取。

detailedSteps.en: Optional membrane fraction: ultracentrifuge the cytoplasmic supernatant at 100,000×g for 1 h at 4°C (requires SW-41 Ti rotor or equivalent). Resulting supernatant = soluble cytoplasm; pellet = total membrane fraction (resuspend in RIPA + 1% SDS).
detailedSteps.zh: 可选膜组分：将细胞质上清在 100,000×g、4°C 超速离心 1 h（需 SW-41 Ti 转头或同等设备）。上清 = 可溶性细胞质；沉淀 = 总膜组分（用 RIPA + 1% SDS 重悬）。

detailedSteps.en: Quantify all fractions by BCA or Bradford assay. Verify fractionation quality by western blot using compartment markers: GAPDH or tubulin (cytoplasm), Lamin B1 or Histone H3 (nucleus), Na/K-ATPase or E-cadherin (membrane), VDAC or HSP60 (mitochondria).
detailedSteps.zh: BCA 或 Bradford 法定量所有组分。用区室标志蛋白 WB 验证分级质量：GAPDH 或 tubulin（细胞质）、Lamin B1 或 Histone H3（细胞核）、Na/K-ATPase 或 E-cadherin（膜）、VDAC 或 HSP60（线粒体）。

detailedSteps.en: Prepare fractions for western blot: add 2× Laemmli sample buffer, boil at 95°C for 5 min, load 10–20 µg protein per lane. Store remaining fractions at −80°C; use within 3 months.
detailedSteps.zh: 制备 WB 上样：加 2× Laemmli 上样缓冲液，95°C 煮沸 5 min，每泳道上样 10–20 µg 蛋白。剩余组分 −80°C 保存，3 个月内使用。

note.en: Cytoplasmic fraction can be stored at −80°C while nuclear extraction is done on a separate day.
note.zh: 细胞质组分可 −80°C 保存，核提取可另日进行。

note.en: All fractions (cytoplasmic and nuclear extract) can be stored at −80°C for up to 1 month before western blot analysis.
note.zh: 所有组分（细胞质和核提取物）可 −80°C 保存最多 1 个月后再进行 WB 分析。

components.name: 1. Wash cells 2× ice-cold PBS; collect by scraping + 500×g 5 min 4°C

note.en: ≥2×10⁷ cells per fractionation. Work on ice throughout.
note.zh: 每次分级 ≥2×10⁷ 细胞。全程冰上操作。

components.name: 2. Resuspend in nuclei_isolation_buffer (0.1% NP-40); pipette 10× gently; ice 10–15 min

note.en: 200 µL per 10⁷ cells. Do NOT vortex. Adjust NP-40 (0.05–0.2%) by cell type.
note.zh: 每 10⁷ 细胞加 200 µL。不要涡旋。按细胞类型调 NP-40（0.05–0.2%）。

note.en: Supernatant = cytoplasmic fraction (keep on ice). Verify nuclei integrity by microscopy (dark/intact in pellet).
note.zh: 上清 = 细胞质组分（冰上保存）。显微镜验证核完整性。

components.name: 4. Wash nuclear pellet: 500 µL PBS, pipette gently, 600×g 5 min 4°C (×2)
5. Extract nuclei: RIPA or high-salt buffer (400 mM NaCl), rotate 30 min 4°C; brief sonication (3× 5 s, 20%)

note.en: Nuclear extract buffer: 20 mM HEPES pH 7.9, 400 mM NaCl, 1 mM EDTA, 1 mM DTT, 10% glycerol + protease inhibitors.
note.zh: 核提取缓冲液：20 mM HEPES pH 7.9、400 mM NaCl、1 mM EDTA、1 mM DTT、10% 甘油 + 蛋白酶抑制剂。

note.en: Supernatant = nuclear extract. Pellet = insoluble chromatin.
note.zh: 上清 = 核提取物。沉淀 = 不溶性染色质。

components.name: 7. Optional membrane fraction: ultracentrifuge cytoplasmic sup at 100,000×g 1 h 4°C

note.en: Supernatant = soluble cytoplasm. Pellet = total membranes (resuspend in RIPA+1% SDS). Requires ultracentrifuge (SW-41 Ti or equivalent).
note.zh: 上清 = 可溶性细胞质。沉淀 = 总膜组分（RIPA+1% SDS 重悬）。需超速离心机（SW-41 Ti 或同等）。

components.name: 8. Quantify all fractions (Bradford/BCA); verify by WB with fraction markers

note.en: Markers: Cytoplasm → GAPDH/tubulin; Nucleus → Lamin B1/H3; Membrane → Na/K-ATPase/cadherin; Mito → VDAC/HSP60.
note.zh: 标记蛋白：细胞质 → GAPDH/tubulin；细胞核 → Lamin B1/H3；膜 → Na/K-ATPase/cadherin；线粒体 → VDAC/HSP60。

note.en: Add loading buffer + boil for WB. Load equal protein (10–20 µg/lane).
note.zh: 加上样缓冲液煮沸后做 WB。每泳道等量上样（10–20 µg）。

notes.en: QC: WB with compartment markers is mandatory. Cross-contamination = incomplete lysis or wrong centrifugation speed. Hard-to-lyse cells (primary neurons, muscle) may need 0.2–0.5% NP-40. For RNA fractionation: add RNase inhibitor (RNaseOUT) to all buffers.
notes.zh: 质控：必须用标记蛋白 WB 验证。交叉污染 = 裂解不充分或离心不当。难裂解细胞可增加 NP-40 至 0.2–0.5%。RNA 分级需全程加 RNase 抑制剂。

ref: Dignam et al. (1983) Nucleic Acids Res 11:1475; Herrmann et al. (2018) Nat Protoc 13:2548

usage.en: Separate cytoplasmic and nuclear fractions to analyze protein localization by western blot.
usage.zh: 分离细胞质和细胞核组分，WB 分析蛋白质亚细胞定位。
